product.title: K&H Pet Products Cool Bed III Dog Cooling Mat, Indoor Outdoor Cooling Beds for Large Dogs, Chilling Pet Pad for in Home, Outdoor Houses, Crates, Yards, Porches - Large 44 X 32in Chill Blue

brand_store.text: Visit the K&H Pet Products Store

product.description: Keep pets cooler than ever! No electricity required to operate the Cool Bed III. Simply add water through the easy fill cap and adjust the comfort with the easy air valve. Our unique cool core diverts liquid better than ever throughout the bed for advanced cooling power. Tough nylon/vinyl exterior. The Cool Bed III is the affordable choice for any dog owner looking to offer their pet a comfy, dry, cool place to relax. This cooling dog bed is recommended for indoor and outdoor use to help keep dogs cool in the summer months. Recommended for use in temperatures under 100°F. Place in a shaded area for best performance. To activate the Cool Bed III simply add water, no tools needed. The more water used, the more cushioning and cooling capabilities the dog cooling mat will have. You can experiment for the optimal feel of the Cool Bed III.
feature_bullets: POWERFUL COOLING: Cooling mat for dogs uses no electricity and contains no toxic gels; it wicks heat out of your pet and releases it into the air, keeping fido or kitty cool
HEALTHY COMFORT: Dog cooling mat provides cooling pet comfort and support for pets with arthritis, hip dysplasia, excessive panting, and more
INDOOR/OUTDOOR DOG BED: Cooling dog bed is recommended for indoor and outdoor use, just add water to provide consistent cooling comfort for your pet
SAFE NON-TOXIC: No toxic gels in this pet cooling mat, perfect for cats, dogs or any other animal that may need to chill out
SIZING: Large size measures 32 X 44 Inches and weighs 33-50lbs when filled; due to weight it is recommended to place in desired area prior to filling; always place in shaded area for best performance
COLORADO BRAND YOU TRUST: Designed by K&H with 25+ years of experience in creating safe, innovative, quality products for pets, ensuring safe reliability and top-tier craftsmanship for pet parents
USES: Can be used inside or outside, it is not recommended to be moved frequently; try the lightweight K&H Coolin' Pet Pad for portable cooling instead

specifications.value: Cooling pet bed is designed for indoor and outdoor use. The best results will be obtained when used in a shady area. When using outdoors, always place the Cool Bed III in a shady, cool spot, as this will maximize its heat wicking abilities. Recommended for us in temperatures under 95 degrees Fahrenheit.

specifications.name: Care Instructions

local.title: Best cooling bed for pets
local.text: This is my 5th time buying this product? Not because it's defective or anything was wrong, but bc I keep moving and its more cost effective for me to buy a new one rather than moving it cross country several times. I've used this on both my dogs (60 lbs each- Collie and pitbull), my rabbit, and my cat occ enjoys sleeping on this as well. My collie tends to paw on all his beds and it has never ripped. I use this in both my dogs crates and they go in there on their own to sleep on this. My collie LOVES this in the summer and I save a lot on energy by not needing to turn on the AC all the time bc he just goes on this to sleep if he feels hot. My pitbull has a ton of orthopedic issues and this def helps him. When I still had my rabbit, I bought a small one for him and he was on it all the times, sometimes he went to sleep with the dogs on their cooling bed. Mine never chewed on the bed so it was safe for him. He would paw and dig on the bed all the time and again, never got damaged or leaked water. The longest I've had these cooling beds was prob 3-4 yrs before I move again and replaced it, so I can't comment on whether these beds lasting longer, but I feel that it was a great investment for any bed lasting more than a year since that's the lifespan of most of my dogs beds due to all the pawing they do. I add a tiny bit of bleach when I fill it up to prevent mold from forming, it is a water bed after all.... I also love that it is so easy to wipe these down to clean them if you need to. My dogs has had diarrhea and vomited all over these beds and yep I never had to get rid of them since they clean really well for me and didn't even stain. My cat had behavioral issues when I first got him and he peed all over these beds, and for those who have cats you know how horrible cat urine can be, yet I was able to clean it and get rid of the smell. You can fill it up as much or as little as you want. I add a bit more water so its more cushiony for my pups. Downside is that it is VERY heavy when you fill it up with water (especially the large one), so I recommend you to fill it up where you intend on keeping the beds- also prob why I just threw these beds out when it came time to moving. The small bed you can def fill it up and not have too much trouble moving it around. In addition to having one for my rabbit, I had the small ones lined in the back seat of my car during the summer months for my pups during road trips. Overall I love these beds, I will continue to buy them as long as I have pets. Yes they're heavy and annoying, but they do what they're intended to do and they last forever. I've tried a ton of cooling beds when I was searching them for my collie when he was still a puppy and as soon as I found this product years ago, I will stay loyal to it, bc honestly you def won't find another cooling bed that works as well as this. I am not being compensated for this review, just wanted to share my experience after using it and buying it for so many years.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 19, 2020

local.title: Excellent Product, Highly Recommended.
local.text: I was concerned based on some of the reviews that it wouldn't be durable, but it's held up well in the year since I purchased it. My dog loves to dig a little nest before lying down and he sometimes starts digging in the Cool Bed before I can stop him. It's survived this and everything else without any leaks. It is a nice refuge from the heat for my dog who is getting up in years. Update: I've had this bed for two very hot summers now. I've updgraded my review from four to five stars now. It is an excellent product. Very durable. My dog has destroyed a mattress and several blankets with his digging, but the cool bed is unscathed. I've tested it out on very hot days and even through my clothes I can feel almost cold lying on the bed. When it's hot, my dog is on the cool bed. This is a great purchase! p.s. I'm absolutely stumped over the fact that this product has only 50% five-star reviews. deserves at least 80 or 90.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 21, 2018

local.title: AMAZING. Wish it lasted longer.
local.text: Got this for my Labrador’s crate since he has trouble sleeping when it’s too hot. Absolutely amazing and worked wonders. He loved it. Kept him nice and cool during the hot summer and he always looked forward to taking breaks and sleeping in his crate. Easy to assemble. -1 star because after 4 months I noticed very tiny drops of water pooling in a few areas of the bed. He doesn’t wear a collar in his crate and he has short nails. Tried to fix the holes myself and it worked for a while. I read many reviews that the bed lasted multiple summers so was a bit bummed. I will buy again next summer for sure because my dog and I were both happy with it.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 15, 2023

local.title: Works well!
local.text: This is the third cool bed I purchased! It works well, easy to fill up with water. It stays cool, but not on direct sunlight. It's a bit flat and not cushiony. Small ones are easy to move around, but the big ones get really heavy to move, and not advisable to move around. My dogs loved chewing and pulling off the cap, that's the only problem I encountered. Gotten very affordable as compared 20 years ago.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on June 10, 2025

local.title: Hit and miss.
local.text: I am torn. I purchased two and one is perfect and my dog is addicted to it. Very good quality and great for old dogs who need cushiony water bed comfort over or under other bed. When laid on bare it is downright cold. I(and the dog) love it. It can easily be covered with blanket to get warmth but still have waterbed feel- great for big old dogs or any dog that likes cusion bed. The other one had the sponge inside detach almost immediately after emptying the first fill of water.(Gently emptying since it had to be moved and was very heavy full). I tried to fix but could never get the sponge to lay flat. The sponge inside is a big wadded mess and impossible for dog to lay on due to massive lump in middle. I tried emailing sender and calling but could never get a replacement. I pretty much gave up on them. I would gladly take either color and return defective one promptly. I use to live in the same city and would have driven it over now I am on other side of the country in South Florida (North Cuba) where the dogs would have really enjoyed its cooling capability Update-Both beds completely balled up inside outer shell. I emailed and called the company several times in the past and never received a response. Unfortunate since it is a great product when it was working.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on May 7, 2015

global.title: Dog loves it
global.text: My dog loves this bed, uses it all year. This is the 3rd one I had to get in 2 years tho as the seams split. Will probably continue to replace it as needed just because she loves it so much.

global.title: Excelente cama para perros
global.text: Excelente para perros que están en lugares con calor

global.title: A valiant product, great with dogs...and 4 y.o. boys
global.text: I bought my 4th small size Cool Bed this week. The first one was purchased in 2007 for my Border Collie who was prone to heat strokes and who had to travel long distances in my AC less Echo to go to Agility Trials and Flyball tournaments. It worked so well that my husband bought 2 for his dogs. Unfortunately, all 3 were left on the roof of the truck one night and ended up run over by tractor trailers for a whole night. We found them on the side of the road the morning after. Only one survived, despite being slightly damaged. It's now 12 years old and starting to delaminate. It's the one that you see in this picture, in a flowered pillow case, under a teddy bear :) This is my 4 y.o. boy's bed. It's narrower than a twin size.Our youngest boy has a very light sleep and the heat really bothers him. We were contemplating just going for it and installing the AC in our house... When I thought about our valiant CoolBed... So we tried it: when Nico is hot, he lays on the cool bed. When he is cool enough, he lays on the other half of his bed. Works like a charm, he sleeps through the night. Yay! But as I was saying, the CoolBed is now starting to die... And even though there is a pad under the bedsheet in case of "accidents", we wanted a new one.Now be aware, these are not for puppies or dog with anxiety issues who could chew or scratch the bed. It won't survive. But with dogs who understand a bed's purpose, it's awesome. Fill it with water and the remove the excess air with the valve until water want to come out and that's it. I regularly change the pillow case, and clean the outside of the cool bed with soapy water now and then. Another tip... You don't need a huge cool bed for your dog. 17"x24" was perfect for Border Collies... And it fits in a pillow case :)

global.title: Es verdaderamente refrigerante
global.text: Es verdaderamente refrigerante para mi mascota

global.title: It is a great product. Definitely cool and comfortable
global.text: It is a great product. Definitely cool and comfortable. Very relaxing for my dog who has hip dysplasia and feels very hot in summers. Highly recommended!
